title: User
description: A Lobsters community member's public profile

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the account was created

is_admin.description: Whether the user has administrator privileges

is_moderator.description: Whether the user has moderator privileges

karma.description: Karma score derived from story and comment votes (omitted for admins)

avatar_url.description: URL of the user's avatar image

invited_by_user.description: Username of the user who sent the invitation; null for founding members

github_username.description: GitHub username if linked (omitted when not set)

mastodon_username.description: Mastodon handle if linked (omitted when not set)
